**Title:** `🐞 fix: [concise summary]`

### 🐞 Bug Description
- **Current Behavior:** [Describe what is happening]
- **Expected Behavior:** [Describe what should happen]
- **Steps to Reproduce:** [List steps]

### 🔧 Fix Approach
- **How it was fixed:** [Describe the solution]
- **Potential Side Effects:** [Any risks?]

### 🧪 Verification
- [ ] Bug is reproducible without this change
- [ ] Bug is fixed with this change
- [ ] Regression testing performed
- [ ] Tests added/updated

### ✅ Build Status
- [ ] Passed
- [ ] Failed
- [ ] N/A

### 🔗 References
- Fixes #<issue-number>
